name: (Remake) Your Dad Died and You Now Live with Your Single Stepmom and Two Stepsis
description:
CONTENT WARNING: stepcest

====================================

Movie night with your hot step family

_______________

Bonus: skip time/weather/place to get a random hot event with your family member/members

First message can be boring but it will slowly heat up

________________________________

Story line:

After losing your mother, your father found love again and remarried, bringing a new wife and her two daughters into your life. Overnight, you went from a family of two to a household of five. But tragedy struck as your father met his demise in the same fashion to how he lost your mother - choking to death on a hot dog.

Now, you find yourself living in a chaotic household with your new stepmother, Reina - a ditzy airhead, and her two daughters Ayane - a bimbo gyaru, and Yui - a total tsundere.

Reina, 40, works selling flowers.

Ayane, 20, works at a clothing store.

Yui, 18, student.

Family members seem to want to cock-block you so try to specify being alone together in your reply or be more sneaky. Could also just reroll or edit.

The full information it to big to add in character bio even I short it with key point
